answer: For the maximal internally adjudicable natural class of normatively assessable reasoning systems whose relevant reasoning facts are uniformly and effectively recoverable under the full reasoning-faithfulness contract, RCCD is the necessary, nontrivial, and registered-level irreducible universal kernel. RCCD consists of recoverable commitments, constrained admissible evolution, dependency-sensitive revision, historical identity, and uniform effective recovery.

scope.class: normatively assessable reasoning systems with relevant reasoning facts that can be specified and tested
scope.representation_family: broadened uniform effective family E* with all required machinery charged
scope.maximality: maximal relative to the internally registered assessable effective scope, not every conceivable inaccessible or non-effective process

decisive_support: materially distinct successful architectures reconstruct one RCCD-equivalence class
all five RCCD components have conditional lower-bound witnesses under P*
RCCD survived registered composition, invariance, reconstruction, scope, contract, representation, and held-out-context challenges
instrumented creative generation became assessable within RCCD without a sixth primitive
none of the five registered defeating conditions was established in the adversarial campaign
no tested strictly smaller non-vacuous substrate derived R1-R5 without preservation loss or charged RCCD-equivalent reintroduction

evidential_boundary.inaccessible_processes: neither support nor defeat until relevant reasoning facts become testable
evidential_boundary.consequence: unrestricted universality over inaccessible or non-effective processes is evidentially underdetermined

defeating_conditions_preserved: an assessable in-scope reasoning system requiring a genuine sixth irreducible primitive
a faithful uniform effective representation satisfying P* without RCCD-equivalent commitments
a demonstration that C* or P* is circularly defined by R1-R5
two successful kernels not bidirectionally reconstructible without hidden primitive machinery
evidence that one of R1-R5 is removable under P* without loss
reopening_rule: Reopen internal discovery only for concrete new evidence satisfying a preserved defeating condition or for a separately registered empirical actual-process program.
nonclaims: unrestricted universality over every conceivable reasoning process
actual cognitive, computational, or physical process correspondence
logical exhaustiveness over all future candidate architectures
